# attractor-types

Foundational type definitions for Attractor pipeline engine. Exports error taxonomy with structured classification, thread-safe context store with copy-on-write isolation, execution outcome types, crash-recovery checkpoint system. Consumed by all downstream crates in workspace.

## Contents

- [Cargo.toml](./Cargo.toml) — Crate manifest. Declares deps: serde, serde_json, thiserror, tokio, uuid, tracing, chrono. Dev deps: tempfile, criterion. Benchmark target: `context`.
- [src/lib.rs](./src/lib.rs) — Error taxonomy (`AttractorError`), context store (`Context`), pipeline control enums (`StageStatus`, `FidelityMode`), execution outcomes (`Outcome`), crash-recovery (`Checkpoint`).
- [benches/context.rs](./benches/context.rs) — Criterion benchmarks measuring `Context::set`, `Context::get`, `Context::apply_updates`, `Context::snapshot`, concurrent access patterns.

## Stack

- **Language**: Rust
- **Error Handling**: thiserror
- **Serialization**: serde, serde_json
- **Async**: tokio (multi-thread runtime for benchmarks)
- **Time**: chrono
- **Benchmarking**: Criterion.rs
- **Public API**: `lib.rs` exports all symbols; no sub-modules.

## API Surface

Public exports define workspace contract:

- **`AttractorError`** — thiserror enum. Categories: LLM (`ProviderError`, `RateLimited`, `AuthError`, `RequestTimeout`, `ContextLengthExceeded`), Parser (`ParseError`), Pipeline (`ValidationError`, `HandlerError`, `GoalGateUnsatisfied`, `NoRetryTarget`, `RetriesExhausted`), Tools (`ToolError`, `CommandTimeout`, `CliNotFound`), Agent (`LoopDetected`, `TurnLimitReached`), Generic (`Io`, `Json`, `Other`).
- **`Result<T>`** — type alias `std::result::Result<T, AttractorError>`.
- **`Context`** — `Arc<tokio::sync::RwLock<ContextInner>>` wrapper. Methods: `new()`, `set()`, `get()`, `get_string()`, `append_log()`, `snapshot()`, `clone_isolated()`, `apply_updates()`. Standard `Clone` shares state; `clone_isolated()` deep-copies for parallel branch isolation.
- **`Checkpoint`** — Crash-recovery snapshot. Fields: `timestamp`, `current_node`, `completed_nodes`, `node_retries`, `context_values`, `logs`. Methods: `save(path)` (pretty JSON), `load(path)`.
- **`StageStatus`** — Execution status: `Success`, `PartialSuccess`, `Retry`, `Fail`, `Skipped`.
- **`Outcome`** — Stage result. Fields: `status`, `preferred_label`, `suggested_next_ids`, `context_updates`, `notes`, `failure_reason`. Constructors: `success(notes)`, `fail(reason)`, `with_label(status, label)`.
- **`FidelityMode`** — Context truncation levels: `Full`, `Truncate`, `Compact`, `SummaryLow`, `SummaryMedium`, `SummaryHigh`.

## Behavioral Contracts

**Error Display Patterns** (verbatim from `AttractorError` thiserror attributes):

- `ProviderError { provider, status, message, .. }`: "`Provider {provider} returned HTTP {status}: {message}`"
- `RateLimited { provider, retry_after_ms }`: "`Rate limited by {provider}, retry after {retry_after_ms}ms`"
- `AuthError { provider }`: "`Authentication failed for provider {provider}`"
- `RequestTimeout { provider, timeout_ms }`: "`Request to {provider} timed out after {timeout_ms}ms`"
- `ContextLengthExceeded { provider, message }`: "`Context length exceeded for {provider}: {message}`"
- `ParseError { line, col, message, .. }`: "`DOT parse error at line {line}, col {col}: {message}`"
- `ValidationError(_)`: "`Pipeline validation failed: {0}`"
- `HandlerError { handler, node, message }`: "`Handler '{handler}' failed on node '{node}': {message}`"
- `GoalGateUnsatisfied { node }`: "`Goal gate unsatisfied: node '{node}' did not reach SUCCESS`"
- `NoRetryTarget { node }`: "`No retry target for failed goal gate '{node}'`"
- `RetriesExhausted { node, attempts }`: "`Max retries exhausted for node '{node}' after {attempts} attempts`"
- `ToolError { tool, message }`: "`Tool '{tool}' error: {message}`"
- `CommandTimeout { timeout_ms }`: "`Command timed out after {timeout_ms}ms`"
- `CliNotFound { binary }`: "`CLI binary '{binary}' not found — ensure it is installed and on PATH`"
- `LoopDetected { window }`: "`Agent loop detected after {window} consecutive identical tool calls`"
- `TurnLimitReached { turns }`: "`Turn limit reached: {turns} turns`"

**Error Classification Logic**:

- `is_retryable()` returns `true` for: `RateLimited`, `CommandTimeout`, `ProviderError` with `retryable: true`.
- `is_terminal()` returns `true` for: `AuthError`, `ValidationError`, `ContextLengthExceeded`, `CliNotFound`.
- `http_status()` maps: `RateLimited`→429, `AuthError`→401, `ProviderError`→status field, `RequestTimeout`/`CommandTimeout`→504, `ValidationError`→400, `ContextLengthExceeded`→413.

**Serialization**:

- `StageStatus` and `FidelityMode` use serde `rename_all = "snake_case"`.
- `Checkpoint.save()` uses `serde_json::to_string_pretty`.

**Benchmarking Patterns**:

- `fn runtime()` returns `&'static tokio::runtime::Runtime` via `std::sync::OnceLock`. Eliminates runtime creation overhead.
- `iter_batched` clones `HashMap` outside timed section with `BatchSize::SmallInput` for `apply_updates` tests.

## File Relationships

- **Consumers**: `crates/attractor-pipeline/` uses `Context` for state propagation, `Checkpoint` for persistence in `checkpoint.rs`, `Outcome` for handler returns. `crates/attractor-agent/` uses `FidelityMode` for prompt truncation. `crates/attractor-llm/` maps provider errors to `AttractorError`. `crates/attractor-tools/` converts tool failures to `ToolError`.
- **State Sharing**: `Context` uses `Arc<RwLock>` pattern. `clone_isolated()` enables parallel execution branches in `crates/attractor-pipeline/src/handlers/parallel.rs`.
- **Recovery**: `Checkpoint` schema version implied by struct fields. Loaded by pipeline engine on restart.
